# qrcodegen — QR Code generator library (JavaScript)

- **Project:** QR Code generator library, by Project Nayuki
- **Upstream:** https://github.com/nayuki/QR-Code-generator
- **Project page:** https://www.nayuki.io/page/qr-code-generator-library
- **Version vendored:** v1.5.0 (pinned release tag) — the last upstream release
  that ships the pure-JavaScript port (`javascript/qrcodegen.js`); later
  releases replaced it with a TypeScript port.
- **Exact file:** https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nayuki/QR-Code-generator/v1.5.0/javascript/qrcodegen.js
- **SHA-256 (unmodified upstream file):**
  `99a61998d4cedf7b1d927ac8ae2f41e0c64a5c89d7de0a76bffd3cb4dda40e89`
- **License:** MIT

**Local modification:** `qrcodegen.js` in this directory is the upstream file
with a provenance header comment prepended and an ES-module wrapper appended
(`export { qrcodegen }; export default qrcodegen;`). The upstream code itself
is unmodified.
